code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test13-NOV-2020Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, indicating possible impaired renal function. Urinalysis reveals significant proteinuria, glucosuria, mild ketonuria, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal), suggesting renal tubular dysfunction or possible glomerular pathology. No evidence of urinary tract infection (negative nitrites, leukocytes). Further nephrological evaluation is recommended.

coding.display: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
